content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Maximum Increase". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/702/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: The maximum increase in the value of the array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
